keyFeatures.en: Generate strong passwords and store them in a secure vault
keyFeatures.zh: 生成强密码并将其安全存储在密码库中

keyFeatures.en: Single-sign on (SSO) and adaptive MFA solutions
keyFeatures.zh: 单点登录（SSO）和自适应多因素认证（MFA）解决方案

description.en: What's included: 100 GB storage, 50 monthly credits, unlimited devices, 100% offline access, SSO, MFA, and more
description.zh: 包含内容：100 GB 存储空间，每月50积分，不限设备数量，100% 离线访问，单点登录（SSO），多因素认证（MFA）等

description.en: What's included: 1 TB storage, 1000 monthly credits, unlimited devices, 100% offline access, SSO, MFA, and more
description.zh: 包含内容：1 TB 存储空间，每月1000积分，不限设备数量，100% 离线访问，单点登录（SSO），多因素认证（MFA）等

weaknesses.en: Limited commercial use for the free plan
weaknesses.zh: 免费计划的商业用途有限

positioning.en: LastPass is positioned as the best password manager with strong security features and user-friendly interface.
positioning.zh: LastPass 定位为具有强大安全功能和用户友好界面的最佳密码管理器。
